stdout:
Usage: gaia inquiry obligation add [OPTIONS] TARGET_QID

 Add a synthetic obligation for an inquiry target.

 Records a "what must be shown" note against a target QID вЂ” a
 ProofState-style obligation visible in the inquiry review report.
 Pure state.json mutation; no IR / priors / beliefs change.

 ``--kind`` selects the diagnostic kind; allowed values are
 ``focus_weakness`` / ``other`` (default) / ``prior_hole`` /
 ``structural_hole`` / ``support_weak`` (see ``VALID_OBLIGATION_KINDS``
 in :mod:`gaia.engine.inquiry.state`).

 Example:

 .. code-block:: bash

     gaia inquiry obligation add my_claim \
         -c "Show the prior is justified by the cited evidence." \
         --kind prior_hole

в•­в”Ђ Arguments в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв•®
в”‚ *    target_qid      TEXT  QID the obligation is about. [required]           в”‚

в”‚    --path,--target          TEXT  Package path (--target accepted as an      в”‚
